title: Implement WebRequest License Handler in Desktop App
description: Enhance the Electron desktop app to handle WebRequest-based license validation, bridging the gap between trading terminals and the license API. The app should intercept local requests and manage license state.

current_implementation.status: ZMQ bridge implemented, WebRequest handler needs enhancement

requirements: Create local HTTP proxy server to intercept WebRequest calls (optional fallback)
Implement license validation caching to reduce API calls
Sync license state across all connected agents
Provide UI feedback for license status

responsibilities: Emit events for license state changes

interface.validateLicense: (key: string, deviceId: string, platform: string) => Promise<LicenseResult>

task_2_webrequest_proxy.description: Local HTTP proxy for WebRequest interception (optional)
task_2_webrequest_proxy.purpose: Handle MT5 WebRequest calls locally before forwarding to API
features: Handle offline mode with cached tokens

task_3_ipc_handlers.description: Add IPC handlers for renderer process

task_4_ui_integration.description: Update React components for license display

scenario_1_mt5_startup.description: MT5 EA validates license on startup
flow: 3. EA stores token and starts operation
4. EA connects to desktop app via ZMQ
5. Desktop app receives account data stream

scenario_2_desktop_initiated.description: User activates license from desktop app
flow: 1. User enters license key in Settings
5. Connected agents receive license state via command channel

license_state_sync.description: Keep license state synchronized across all components

storage.agents: Each agent caches token with TTL

acceptance_criteria: License validation works from desktop app UI
Connected MT5/cTrader agents report valid license status
Token refresh happens automatically before expiry
Multiple devices can connect within license limit
License expiration shows warning 24h in advance
Deactivating a device frees up license slot
deliverables: Updated React components for license UI
